MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Bipolar Inventory of Signs and Symptoms Scale (BISS) & Montgomery-Asberg Depression Rating Scale (MADRS)
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Clinician-rated symptom scales covering the most recent 7 days, integrating self-report and family/clinician observation. BISS items are rated 0-4; MADRS items are rated 0-6. NOTE: the BISS manual lists 44 items (22 depression + 22 mania) but this dataset contains 43 BISS items; depression items biss_1-biss_22 align with the manual, while the mania items biss_23-biss_43 are mapped to the manual's mania items 23-43 provisionally (one manual mania item, e.g. 'Impaired insight', is not represented). Verify the mania item alignment before analysis.

biss_1.Description: BISS item 1: Sadness - reported (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_2.Description: BISS item 2: Sadness - observed (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_3.Description: BISS item 3: Pessimism (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_4.Description: BISS item 4: Suicidality (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_5.Description: BISS item 5: Worry (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_6.Description: BISS item 6: Guilt (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_7.Description: BISS item 7: Feelings of inadequacy (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_8.Description: BISS item 8: Low energy (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_12.Description: BISS item 12: Reduced sex drive (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_13.Description: BISS item 13: Anxiety - reported (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_14.Description: BISS item 14: Anxiety - observed (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_16.Description: BISS item 16: Fearfulness (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_17.Description: BISS item 17: Insomnia (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_18.Description: BISS item 18: Excessive sleep (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_19.Description: BISS item 19: Reduced appetite (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_20.Description: BISS item 20: Increased appetite (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_21.Description: BISS item 21: Impaired concentration (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_22.Description: BISS item 22: Agitation (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_23.Description: BISS item 23: Irritability - reported (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_24.Description: BISS item 24: Irritability - observed (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_25.Description: BISS item 25: Aggressive behavior (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_26.Description: BISS item 26: Hyperactive (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_27.Description: BISS item 27: Energetic (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_28.Description: BISS item 28: Increased social interest (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_29.Description: BISS item 29: Racing thoughts - reported (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_30.Description: BISS item 30: Pressured speech (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_31.Description: BISS item 31: Increased sexuality (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_32.Description: BISS item 32: Less need for sleep (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_33.Description: BISS item 33: Grandiose (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_34.Description: BISS item 34: Elated (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_35.Description: BISS item 35: Sharpened thinking (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_36.Description: BISS item 36: Elevated evening energy/interests (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_37.Description: BISS item 37: Impulsive (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_38.Description: BISS item 38: Distractible (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_39.Description: BISS item 39: Risky behavior (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_40.Description: BISS item 40: Affective lability (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

biss_41.Description: BISS item 41: Persecutory ideas (clinician-rated 0-4 over the past 7 days).

madrs_1.Description: MADRS item 1: Apparent sadness (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_2.Description: MADRS item 2: Reported sadness (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_3.Description: MADRS item 3: Inner tension (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_4.Description: MADRS item 4: Reduced sleep (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_5.Description: MADRS item 5: Reduced appetite (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_6.Description: MADRS item 6: Concentration difficulties (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_7.Description: MADRS item 7: Lassitude (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_8.Description: MADRS item 8: Inability to feel (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_9.Description: MADRS item 9: Pessimistic thoughts (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

madrs_10.Description: MADRS item 10: Suicidal thoughts (clinician-rated 0-6 over the past 7 days; even values 0/2/4/6 are anchored, odd values are intermediate).

biss_depression.Description: BISS Depression subscale: sum of items biss_1-biss_22. n/a if any item missing.

biss_mania.Description: BISS Mania subscale: sum of items biss_23-biss_43. n/a if any item missing.

madrs_total.Description: MADRS total: sum of items madrs_1-madrs_10 (range 0-60). n/a if any item missing.
